item.title: How did it get this bad?
item.description: Back then, posts would hit most popular with 10k+ votes, people would call out obvious strawmen, and people with different views would engage one another. There was rarely a solely political entry to most popular, and way more art, memes, and other random showing. Now, more than half the front page has
item.dc:creator: Pryotra

item.title: Miranda Rights
item.description: MV edit: I favorited this a few days ago and when I went to look at it, I got a 404. I managed to retrieve it from my favorite thumbnail, so I reposted it. I don't plan on removing it, so favorite away. Send good wishes or whatever. I'm in the process of moving, and it's quite the drag.

item.title: Anti-abortion Violence
item.description:
Dr. George Tiller was shot dead on May 31, 2009, during worship services at the Reformation Lutheran Church in Wichita, where he was serving as an usher. Tiller was shot in the head at point blank range; he was wearing body armor, as he had been since 1998, when the FBI told him he was being targeted by anti-abortion militants.
Tiller was discussed in 28 episodes of the Fox News talk show The O'Reilly Factor in the years leading up to his death, focusing national attention on his practice. Although he later denied it, show host Bill O'Reilly sometimes described him as "Tiller the Baby Killer," a nickname that Congressman Robert Dornan had used on the floor of the US House of Representatives. O'Reilly said he would not want to be Tiller, Kathleen Sebelius, and other pro-choice Kansas politicians "if there is a judgment day." He characterized the doctor as "a savage on the loose, killing babies willy-nilly," and accused him of "operating a death mill," and of protecting the rapists of children.
Throughout his career, Tiller was a frequent target of anti-abortion violence. In June 1986, his clinic was firebombed. While it was being rebuilt, Tiller displayed a sign reading "Hell no, we won't go." On August 19, 1993, anti-abortion extremist Shelley Shannon shot Tiller five times, while he was in his car. At the time she attacked Tiller, Shannon had been an anti-abortion extremist for five years and had written letters of support to the convicted murderer Michael Griffin, who had murdered Dr. David Gunn. She called him "a hero."
Dr. David Gunn of Pensacola, Florida was fatally shot during a protest March 10th 1993. He had been the subject of wanted-style posters distributed by Operation Rescue in the summer of 1992. The man that killed him, Michael Frederick Griffin, was a member of the Ku Klux Klan.
Dr. John Bayard Britton's death was the second assassination of a Pensacola abortion provider in under a year and a half; he had replaced David Gunn after the latter's 1993 murder by another anti-abortionist. The gunman also killer Britton’s bodyguard, a retired Air Force lieutenant colonel, James Herman Barrett Jr (could not find his photo), and wounded Barrett's wife, June, a retired nurse. The murder resulted in several members of Congress calling for the FBI to infiltrate anti-abortion groups, as it had with the Ku Klux Klan.
Shannon Lowney - On December 30th 1994, John Salvi walked into the Planned Parenthood clinic on Beacon Street in Brookline, Massachusetts, carrying a black duffle bag. In the waiting room, he took a semi-automatic rifle from the bag and wordlessly opened fire. A medical assistant, Arjana Agrawal, was hit in the abdomen. Salvi then shot at receptionist Shannon Lowney in the neck, killing her instantly. Approximately forty people were in the room during the assault; of these, five were wounded, including several men who were accompanying women seeking abortions.
Lee Ann Nichols - The gunman left Planned Parenthood, and drove west on Beacon Street to the Preterm Health Services office. Preterm was approximately two miles away and Salvi drove past another abortion facility to get there, but did not stop. He asked receptionist Lee Ann Nichols, "Is this Preterm?" When she said yes, Salvi pulled out a rifle and shot Nichols point blank. As he had at Planned Parenthood, Salvi continued to fire. Among those injured was part-time security guard Richard J. Seron and another employee, Jane Sauer. Seron returned fire. Seron himself was shot four times in the arms, and once in the left hand. Salvi then dropped the black duffle bag, which contained a gun, receipts from a gun dealer in Hampton, New Hampshire and fled. Salvi was captured in Norfolk, Virginia the day after the shootings, after firing over a dozen bullets into the Hillcrest Clinic. The clinic was open at the time, however Salvi was captured before making his way up to the second floor where Hillcrest was located. http://advocatesaz.org/2014/12/30/brookline-clinic-shootings-december-30-1994/
On January 29th 1998 Robert Sanderson (could not find his photo), an off-duty police officer who worked as a security guard at an abortion clinic in Birmingham, Alabama, was killed when his workplace was bombed. Eric Rudolph admitted responsibility; he was also charged with three Atlanta bombings: the 1997 bombing of an abortion center, the 1996 Centennial Olympic Park bombing, and another of a lesbian nightclub. He was found guilty of the crimes and received two life sentences as a result.
On October 23rd 1998, Dr. Barnett Abba Slepian had returned from synagogue, where he was attending a memorial service for his father, and was preparing soup in his kitchen when he was struck by a bullet fired through his window. The bullet shattered his spine and tore his aorta, barely missing his son's head as it exited. He died two hours later. Earlier that afternoon, Slepian's wife Lynne had forwarded a warning of potential attacks on her husband to a local police inspector. Within days of Slepian's murder, anti-abortion groups rallied and staged clinic protests in Buffalo and Rochester, New York.
Colorado Springs Planned Parenthood shooting of November 27th 2015 Police officer Garrett Swasey, 44, who responded to the shooting, Ke'Arre M. Stewart, 29, who ran back to the clinic to warn others after being shot, and Jennifer Markovsky, 35, who was accompanying a friend to the clinic. Nine other victims—five police officers and four civilians—were shot and admitted to local hospitals. Their killer believes “he’ll be met in Heaven by aborted fetuses wanting to thank him for saving unborn babies.”
After the genuine 2001 anthrax attacks, Anti-abortion violence group Army of God mailed hoax letters containing a white powder to 554 clinics. The threat was considered serious, as it arrived shortly after the September 11 terrorist attacks against the United States. The envelopes also contained a note, which said, "You have been exposed to anthrax. We are going to kill all of you. From the Army of God, Virginia Dare Chapter". On December 3, 2003, Clayton Waagner was convicted of 51 charges relating to the anthrax scare.
According to statistics gathered by the National Abortion Federation (NAF), an organization of abortion providers, since 1977 in the United States and Canada, there have been 17 attempted murders, 383 death threats, 153 incidents of assault or battery, 13 wounded, 100 butyric acid stink bomb attacks, 373 physical invasions, 41 bombings, 655 anthrax threats, and 3 kidnappings committed against abortion providers. Between 1977 and 1990, 77 death threats were made, with 250 made between 1991 and 1999. Attempted murders in the U.S. included: in 1985 45% of clinics reported bomb threats, decreasing to 15% in 2000. One fifth of clinics in 2000 experienced some form of extreme activity.
Anti-Abortion uses violence, terrorism to get their way. Do not let them claim moral high ground. They do not have it.

item.title: Am I the asshole?
item.description: Literally just stoop up and walked away from a co-worker who continued to talk to me (about work) after I politely said I was on my unpaid lunch break, but we could talk after I clock back in. I value my time off from work. Whether that’s my 30 minute lunch, PTO or paid holidays. I’m certainly not here by choice. I’ve been forced back after the company decided Covid wasn’t real anymore (it very much is, but I’d like to stay employed so here I am back in office). Please leave me alone when I’m not getting paid to deal with you. I’ll do the same for you.
item.dc:creator: danrathernot

item.dc:creator: mickjl

item.title: Things seen this week during structural assessments!
item.description:
We saw this interesting deck out on one of our assessments. Jenga but 100x bigger!
This home’s access door to their California basement was located in the bathroom. I'm sure they dominated at hide & seek.
Efflorescence is the white chalky powder that you might find on the surface of a concrete or brick wall. It's a sign of moisture intrusion that could lead to major structural issues if not checked out.
Rusted pipes pose a significant threat to your structure’s foundation.
If not taken care of, the post will slip out of place and the girder above will lose crucial support. Regular maintenance on your home is important for this reason. Taking care of the little things now can prevent bigger problems in the future
How close I am to losing my cool.
Rusty pipes soon flake and corrode, creating leaks. Some leaks pose a more significant risk than others.
Leaking pipes can flood the foundation of a building. This could result in cracks in the concrete, significant mold presence, or even the sinking of the foundation. The longer the leaks continue, the greater the damage that they can do to your foundations.
Is it still worth $250,000?
item.dc:creator: AlphaStructural

item.title: Real hero.
item.description: "June begins the war as a fun-loving young woman with a fierce sense of independence that is decades ahead of her time. When the U.S. enters the war she enlists almost immediately, but she is unprepared for the horrors and poor conditions she will face overseas. June battles not only the Nazis, but also hunger, exhaustion, inclement weather and sickness. She often works 18-hour shifts, 7 days a week, caring for the sick, the wounded and the dying. As the war wears on, the daily brutalities tear at her heart, making it harder and harder to keep her fun-loving spirit. But while the constant misery threatens to overwhelm her, June comes to learn that her good-natured attitude is often her most valuable medicine." - History.com
item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Sus Memes v77
item.description:
Jesus fucking Christ. I’d say this couldn’t be real but I’ve been hit on like this before. Let’s just say I have a gift, I can tell why a dude is single within 5 minutes, but I did not need it for these guys.
Catholicism is a bizarre religion
Yup.
A U T I S M
It’s almost like it’s an entire religion made by Italians
And now, the world ends
I’m gonna do it anyway. Just to spite u.
Ur beautiful babe don’t let anyone dim ur shine
Also the crushing weight of existence
I’m game
….yyyeah
BE GAY DO CRIME TAKE UR MEDS also if you’re taking hormones good luck and I love u
This would work on me
If you’re not into hobbits grow up and get on our level. By kneeling most likely. Doesn’t matter it’s fun down here.
Fair but I didn’t raise him to be a model citizen, I raised him to burn this mfer down
That’s what I told people when I was pregnant but it was like in one ear out the other with these idiots. “Are u circumcising” only if it’s a girl Karen is that what you wanna hear? No? Didn’t think so
Additional content from. I think. @PyroDragon ?
Don’t do peoples job for them. Be nice to yourself out of sheer spite bc no one else is gonna be
I like my coffee like I like my men: outside of me.
I Want this on a pillow
Sent to my family of realtors
I’ve yet to meet a real person who is indeed hot enough to act like that
When ppl comment stupid shit on my posts. Usually fatphobic. Just let a bitch live you’re not a doctor
I read this comic. Questionable Content. And the android had a detachable leg. And the dude had sex with the hip socket. And that was odd.
….how? You know what I don’t wanna know. I’m ace, let’s make things LESS sexy all around. Except how men dress. Bc men need to dress sluttier
Gluten free pussy omg
I say this every time someone talks about crystals but so far no one has laughed. Imma keep trying.
The confederacy fully deserves all of the sibling incest jokes. And all of the accusations of racism.
Dump his ass babe we ain’t in a shortage
HA! Hahahahaha. No. My sister finally asked me what flavor of LGBT I am and I was like let’s sort A to Z by gender first and THEN sexuality shall we
I’m almost 30 and still not there yet. I hate Lowes I hate blinds and I hate lawn care. I do love organizing tho.
The baby does not always understand why we won’t share food with him. Spicy is never the problem we just eat like crap and don’t want to change rn because it’s the only thing that brings our depressed autistic asses a tiny amount of joy in this hell scape
Also aren’t they like………geniuses? Like smarter than humans? Idk man
B R I C K S
yeah someone tell me who I’m supposed to be plz thanks
Caffeine just makes me irritated. Maybe meth will make me feel like this?
Hell yeah who doesn’t want this
Lizard tax
